The research presents the development and evaluation of an intelligent cyber threat detection system that integrates Quantum Computing (QC) and Artificial Intelligence (AI). The proposed system uses quantum algorithms, such as Quantum Support Vector Machines (QSVM) and Quantum Neural Networks (QNN), which demonstrated superior performance with accuracies of 95.2% and 96.7%, respectively. The system achieved high detection rates for various cyber threats, including malware, phishing, ransomware, and advanced persistent threats (APTs), with reduced false positive rates. The integration of QC also resulted in faster threat detection and response times,
